name: avadbot
description: Claude Code skill suite: plan review, code review, shipping, QA testing, browser automation, and engineering retrospectives. Works with any project, any language, any framework. Use for /avad-plan-ceo-review, /avad-plan-eng-review, /avad-review, /avad-ship, /avad-qa, /avad-retro, /browse, or any workflow requiring structured plan review, pre-landing code review, one-command shipping, browser-based QA, or engineering retrospectives.
